title: Pkcs11Backend::algorithm() panics on HSM error (trait forces this, but it is a footgun)
description: Scenario: SigningBackend::algorithm() cannot return Result (trait signature), so Pkcs11Backend::algorithm() panics if the HSM is unreachable when algorithm() is first called. This design means any code that calls algorithm() will crash the process rather than propagate an error if the HSM is offline at that moment. The trait is public API that is locked in at v0.1. Adding Result to algorithm() would be a breaking change. Consider whether algorithm() should be fallible before v0.1 ships.
